name: Braised Celery- James Beard
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the celery and drain.
2. Cool the blanched celery.
3. When ready to serve, combine the beef broth, butter, and Dijon mustard in a saucepan over medium heat.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
5. Add the cooled celery to the pan and heat through until warmed.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
NOTE:
You may need up to 3 cups of broth for this dish. Chicken stock or a combination of chicken and beef stock can also be used.
